title: OZReplicator cell aspect-fit decode — Video_Wall spatial layout
goal: Decompile OZReplicator::stamp or OZReplicatorCell scale to find how Motion sizes per-instance stamps against grid pitch. Prior decode: GT screen pitch aspect (1.68) matches tile-native 16:9 (not pitch aspect 3.42). Hypothesis: aspect-preserving cover-fit min(pitchX/w, pitchY/h) — but confirm from the binary. cellFill=pitchX/tileW helps main 3x3 wall but overshoots decorative 1x2/8260-pitch replicators into frame-filling plates (visible as giant blue plate at f11). Fix must be generic (no per-transition) and derived from Motion's actual OZReplicator behavior. Also: projection math verified correct (center-relative Y-DOWN, bbox clipped); the gap is layout.
